'''Javaal''' was the seventh [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Brentaal system/Legends|Brentaal system]]. It was an [[Water/Legends|ice]] ball.<ref name="CatCW" />

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], the space above Javaal was the theater of a [[Battle of Javaal|battle]] concluded with a Republic victory.<ref name="TOR">{{TORcite|type=space|Javaal Fleet Action}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Space Mission "Javaal Fleet Action" in the game ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' takes place in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of Javaal.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
